raw_consumer_statement: I was traveling when my card was stolen. I locked it online right away trying to find if I misplace it, which later cant find. Immediately report to Citi and received a new card. Citi said they closed down the lost one yet I still see transactions went through. So I dared not use my new one while I report the fraud charges on stolen card. Even though I got the new card, Citi still billed me fraudulent charges I never authorized on my card, despite I reported I lost the card and never made the transactions.
